ALPHA BUILD
Welcome to AXIS.
It’s great to have you here. You’re accessing an early prototype. While we refine the final experience, the core science is fully active. Your usage and feedback help shape the future of AXIS.
This project started from a simple personal need: finding a way to deal with the inevitable aches and pains, wanting to stay more mobile, and desk tension that come with modern life. Whether you’re staring at a screen all day or just feeling the years start to catch up with you, these flows are designed to help you move better and feel a little less achy.
QUICK WINS. EVIDENCE-BACKED. DAILY FRIENDLY.
THE PERSPECTIVE & FOUNDATION
Modern life is an endurance sport.
Screens and desks create a physical tax on your body, and AXIS is your manual reset. We use biomechanically sequenced movements to reboot your nervous system and restore natural alignment.
80%
Back pain prevalence
A common issue we target with consistent resets.
70%
Desk-worker tension
Screen posture drives neck and shoulder strain.
100%
Better with intent
Focused movement reliably improves comfort and mood.
